name_en: Balenciaga Paris crush chain bag ⛓️ Classic hourglass silhouette but soft like a pillow, crumpled and unfolded vintage origami texture, timeless and versatile. The crush bag reinterprets the classic with deconstruction techniques, continuing the arched base and pointed edge design, removing handles, keeping the B buckle. Can loop the chain through the ring to fold as a handbag or clutch, or adjust to a single chain for shoulder or crossbody, one bag has four ways to wear. Model: 8911. Size: 39.9*24.9*13.0
